last_completed_round.direction_name: Transplant low-register half-panel staging into the correctness-safe 256x128 pivot
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The richer NCU summary says the live queue should prioritize the only active family that directly attacks 200 registers per thread and the 16.63% active-warps ceiling. The correctness-safe 256x128 pivot should keep its current writer ownership, but transplant the compact staging and register-budget ideas that historically moved occupancy in the right direction.

notes: Build passed for round 2/100. Node A will measure the result next.
